description: JavaFX development support for VS Code with FXML syntax highlighting, Scene Builder integration, code navigation, and FXML formatting
command.openInSceneBuilder.title: Open in Scene Builder
command.setSceneBuilderPath.title: Set Scene Builder Path
config.title: JavaFX Support
config.sceneBuilderPath.description: Path to Scene Builder executable. If empty, the extension will try to find it automatically.
config.outline.showFxId.description: Show fx:id attribute in the FXML Outline view.
config.outline.showText.description: Show text attribute in the FXML Outline view.
config.hover.enabled.description: Enable FXML hover information for controller comments referenced by fx:id bindings and event handlers.
config.hover.delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before showing FXML hover information.
